message:
fix(agent-drivers): code review fixes

ACP Driver:
- Track pending tool calls to provide tool name in result events
- Calculate actual duration for tool calls
- Fix unused loop variable warning

Tmux Driver:
- Add proper shell quoting for command arguments
- Use tmux send-keys -l flag for literal text
- Send Enter key separately to avoid interpretation issues

Claude SDK Driver:
- Handle empty messages array gracefully (already committed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
